headerTitle: AI Forward Deployed Engineer  ·  Production Agentic AI  ·  Strategic Account Embed  ·  Deployment Ownership
subjectText: AI Forward Deployed Engineer — RingCentral (Remote) · $147K–$215K — Will Austin
intro: RingCentral’s AIR Pro team needs engineers who close the gap between acquisition and value realization inside strategic accounts — not advisory, not support. Embed, deploy, ship. Four complete external FDE cycles, 14 live AI endpoints in production. That is the direct equivalent of the experience bar.
bullets: Forward-deployed build ownership, four complete external cycles — embed, requirements discovery, implementation, adoption, documented handoff. Roofing contractor: three county property databases, SMS outreach pipeline. Home services: 400+ email threads parsed and routed. OOH advertising: disconnected spreadsheets into live booking system. Auto repair: work order tracking and client communication. Zero missed scopes. Every engagement closed with a system the client ran without technical support.

Production agentic AI stack — 14 live endpoints: multi-turn agent workflows, prompt chaining, retrieval pipelines, decision logic, fallback handling, and live handoff rules. Zod-validated output contracts on every endpoint so failures surface before they reach users. Human-in-the-loop confirm-before-execute on destructive operations. Per-request observability logging (model ID, prompt version, latency, raw output, correction signals). Continuous monitoring and iteration loop built in from day one.

CRM and API integration in production — HubSpot API and Salesforce API integrated directly in production CRM data flows. IMAP email parsing (imapflow), Stripe webhooks, Google OAuth2, Twilio and Sinch SMS, 100+ REST API routes across TypeScript and Python. The build-integrate-deploy cycle RingCentral AIR Pro customers need is the current operating model across 13 production platforms.

Python, TypeScript, full-stack delivery — Python for data pipelines (1.4M+ property records, batch AI processing, agent orchestration); Node.js + Next.js 15 App Router for full-stack application delivery; PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM; BullMQ + Redis for async job processing; Docker, PM2, Nginx on Linux VPS. Single production owner across all 13 platforms — code review, architecture decisions, monitoring, and iteration.
closingLine: The AIR Pro deployment model — embed inside strategic accounts, translate operational requirements into production-grade agentic AI, own business outcomes — is the exact pattern these four engagements were built around. Available immediately. TX-based, remote.
matchNotes: Strong: FDE embed model exact, 14 production AI endpoints, multi-turn agent workflows, retrieval pipelines, fallback handling, HITL, HubSpot/Salesforce API direct, 100+ REST routes, Python+TypeScript, observability logging. Gaps: telephony domain (SIP/WebRTC/CCaaS), enterprise scale (10k+ users), HIPAA/PCI compliance experience. Telephony is preferred not required.
